controls.name: Account Management
controls.remediation: Remove unused accounts. Restrict OpenClaw allowlist to named users only.

controls.name: Access Enforcement
controls.remediation: Set workspaceOnly=true. Set sandbox mode to all. Restrict sudoers.

controls.name: Least Privilege
controls.remediation: Disable elevated exec unless required. Confirm service account has no unnecessary group memberships.

controls.name: Remote Access
controls.remediation: Set gateway.bind to lan. Use Cloudflare Tunnel for remote access only.

controls.name: Event Logging
controls.remediation: Enable auditd. Set OpenClaw logging level to info or higher.

controls.name: Content of Audit Records
controls.remediation: Ensure audit records include timestamp, user, action, and outcome.

controls.name: Protection of Audit Information
controls.remediation: Audit logs must be owned by root, mode 600. Restrict write access.

controls.name: Audit Record Generation
controls.remediation: Add auditd watch rules for ~/.openclaw/secrets/ and OpenClaw config files.

controls.name: Baseline Configuration
controls.remediation: Maintain openclaw.json.baseline as the documented configuration baseline.

controls.name: Configuration Settings
controls.remediation: Apply all settings in openclaw.json.baseline. Apply all Sarge hardening scripts.

controls.name: Least Functionality
controls.remediation: Disable unused OpenClaw plugins and tools. Remove unnecessary OS packages.

controls.name: Identification and Authentication (Org Users)
controls.remediation: Enable PAM faillock. Restrict OpenClaw to authenticated Discord/channel users only.

controls.name: Authenticator Management
controls.remediation: Set pwquality minlen=12, complexity rules. Set PASS_MAX_DAYS=90, PASS_MIN_DAYS=1.

controls.name: Authentication Feedback
controls.remediation: Ensure login failure messages do not reveal whether username or password was wrong.

controls.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
controls.remediation: Enable TLS on gateway. Use Cloudflare Tunnel (TLS enforced) for all remote access.

controls.name: Protection of Information at Rest
controls.remediation: Secrets directory must be 700. All secret files must be 600. Owner must be service account only.

controls.name: Flaw Remediation
controls.remediation: Enable unattended-upgrades for security patches. Review and apply pending updates.

controls.name: Malicious Code Protection
controls.remediation: Install and configure ClamAV or equivalent. Schedule regular scans.
